rationale: Requester is 0.15 kWh below your 0.35 threshold with urgent need; balanced sharing policy supports neighborhood resilience, and geographic round-robin distribution maintains your safety margin.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.35, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Three neighbors remain critically low; geographic round-robin sharing is sustaining neighborhood resilience without compromising my own safety margin during the extended outage..
